About.about_paragraph: Welcome to our About page! We are a team of passionate individuals dedicated to creating amazing software.

Portfolio.presentation: Welcome to my portfolio page! Here you will find a carefully curated collection of my work and accomplishments. Through this portfolio, I'm to showcase my expertise, creativity, and the value I can bring to your projects.

PortfolioSlug.content: Created a set of promotional materials and branding elements for a corporate event. Crafted a visually unified theme, encompassing a logo, posters, banners, and digital assets. Integrated the client's brand identity while infusing it with a contemporary and innovative approach. Garnered favorable responses from event attendees, resulting in a successful event with heightened participant engagement and increased brand visibility.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

step0.title: Welcome at ABG
step0.description: This is the questionnaire for the digital document exchange
step0.body: Below, we will guide you through the questionnaire so that we can create the appropriate filing and folder structure for you.
step0.more_info_heading: More information about digital document exchange:
step0.note: Please answer all questions, even if anything is unclear. All information can of course be changed and adjusted later.

step1.title: Account
step1.description: Please enter all users who should have access to Nextcloud:
step1.tooltip: All users entered here will have access to all files and folders.

operatingSystem.description: Which operating system do you mainly work with?

step2.title: Outgoing Invoices
step2.description: Invoices issued by the company to customers.
step2.description2: Invoices that the company receives as payment into the company account and those that are paid from the company account.

onlineShop.question: Do you have an online shop?
onlineShop.label: Online Shop
onlineShop.namePlaceholder: Name of the online shop (e.g. WooCommerce)

step3.title: Liabilities
step3.description: Invoices that the company receives and are paid from the company account.

incomingInvoices.label: Incoming invoices
incomingInvoices.description: Invoices that the company usually receives by email or post and which are typically paid by bank transfer from the company account.

recurringBills.label: Recurring bills
recurringBills.description: Invoices that the company receives from suppliers and are valid for a longer period of time. For example, rent/cleaning fees that are charged for the entire year but are paid monthly.

step4.title: Bank
step4.description: Most banks provide camt.053 files. Using these files, the transfer data from your bank account can be imported into our accounting system and you no longer have to worry about providing bank statements. To use this function to the best possible extent, we need access authorization for your bank account to automatically download these files for you.
step4.bank_access_label: Would you like to receive camt.053 files?
step4.camt_iban_tooltip: Please provide all IBANs for which we need access authorization
step4.iban_tooltip: Bank statements must be filed for each IBAN separately
step4.hint:
You will receive information on how to obtain the Camt.053 file from your bank advisor.

Note: Bank files do not need to be uploaded to NextCloud if ABG obtains the Camt.053 files directly from the bank. Company authorization is required for this.
step4.payment_providers_question: Are alternative payment service providers such as PayPal used?

step5.title: Filing
step5.tooltip: If additional categories are added later, they can be created.
step5.description: The filing system contains those documents that do not fit into the other folders mentioned (e.g. insurance policies, purchase contracts, etc.).

extraOptions.leasingContractTooltip: Please upload all related charges to the 'Recurring Bills' folder. Only the contracts belong here.
extraOptions.insuranceContractTooltip: Please upload all related charges to the 'Recurring Bills' folder. Only the contracts belong here.

step6.title: Payroll Accounting
step6.description: If you have employees and their salaries/wages are paid through the company, you can upload all documents relating to employment, termination, current information, and other changes for your employees to the 'Payroll' folder. We provide you with the monthly payroll via Nextcloud.
step6.hasManagingDirector: Is there a managing shareholder who receives a salary?
step6.payrollAccounting: Is payroll accounting carried out by us?
step6.payrollInfo: The monthly payroll is made available via Nextcloud. Please upload all relevant documents to the 'Payroll' folder.

step7.title: General Billing
step7.description: If apartments rented by the company are managed holistically by a property management company, the documents from the property management company must be filed in this folder (e.g. monthly property owner statements, operating cost statements and other documents submitted by the property management company).

step8.title: Cash expenses
step8.description: Bills paid privately by the business owner (and/or an employee) in the store/restaurant, or other cash expenses related to the business that are reimbursed by the business.
step8.tooltip: Receipts can also be photographed, scanned and saved directly to the folder via the NextCloud app.

step9.title: Credit Card
step9.description: Invoices paid by credit card or online orders processed using the credit card. Credit card statements and associated invoices should always be saved in the respective subfolders (according to the billing period).

step10.description:
Monthly PayPal account statement.

Note: If the PayPal account is linked to a bank account, it should be saved in the 'Incoming Invoices' folder. If the PayPal account is linked to a credit card, it should be saved in the correct credit card subfolder.

step11.title: Cash Register
step11.hasCashBalance: Does the company have a cash balance and are smaller invoices paid with it?
step11.cashBookUploadInfo: The cash book including receipts must be uploaded monthly.
step11.cashBookTemplateInfo: If the cash book is not kept via the cash register, you can find a

usesRegisterCash.question: Is a cash register used?
usesRegisterCash.label: Cash register
usesRegisterCash.tooltip: A cash register is an electronic system for recording, documenting, and processing cash and card payments. In Austria, it is required by law for businesses with annual turnover exceeding €15,000 (of which at least €7,500 must be cash turnover).

cashDeskSystem.label: Cash register system
cashDeskSystem.grantAccess: Would you like to grant us access to the cash register system?
cashDeskSystem.grantAccessTooltip: Some cash register providers offer the option to provide an accounting export. For this, we would need access to the cash register.

usesHandCash.question: Is a hand cash register used?
usesHandCash.tooltip: A hand cash register is a physical cash reserve (e.g. a cash box or drawer) used for smaller cash expenses in the business. Unlike an electronic cash register, it is managed manually and documented in a cash book.

step12.title: Inventory
step12.description: A written list of all inventories (e.g., goods) in stock, broken down by type, quantity, and value. (Required at least once a year, at the end of each year).

cashrecipient.title: Cash receipts
cashrecipient.description: Invoices that the entrepreneur pays privately for his company..
